'''''Droids'' 3''' is the third issue of [[Star Wars: Droids (1995)|''Star Wars: Droids'' (1995)]], a [[Dark Horse Comics]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series starring [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]. It was published on [[June 13]], [[1995]] by [[Dark Horse Comics]].

==Publisher's summary==
''Trapped on a drone barge headed for a recycling center, See-Threepio is about to have his memory wiped clean! Artoo races to rescue his old pal, but will Threepio even recognize the plucky little droid by the time he arrives?''
